title: TU München
description: Master's program combining computer science, engineering, and business management.
Focus areas: software engineering, technology management, and entrepreneurship.

title: MEAG GmbH
description: Independently redeveloped a liquidity scoring model (Liquiscore), reimplementing an existing R codebase in Python on Databricks
Co-led design and development of a credit-risk ETL pipeline (PRIME) in Python + PySpark, replacing a legacy MS Access solution
Designed a medallion architecture (bronze/silver/gold) with object-oriented table abstractions, integrated into Databricks Jobs.
Built the full testing pipeline: mock-data generation (CSV/Parquet), unit tests (unittest/pytest), tox config, and CI integration; authored technical docs with Sphinx.
Set up environment-agnostic, config-based parameterization; version control via Git, PRs, and Azure DevOps.
